lastReleaseMessage: Restore dates.ts after a botched regex replacement in the...

barRaise.topFinding: The MEDIUM the last report named is fixed, but the fix is stuck. The two-file doc cohort that closes it (docs/DESIGN.md brand to 'Yes& Scheduler' plus DNS and section-22 cross-reference; CHANGELOG.md v0.4.0/v0.4.1 dates corrected to 2026-06-07) is correct on disk but has sat uncommitted since the 06-13/06-14 drains because the ship step is human-gated and no release.ps1 has run since. That is not free: the working-tree docs/DESIGN.md has been FUSE-truncated and rebuilt twice while waiting, and the dashboard still reports workTreeClean:true against a dirty tree. The whole cycle's work is one commit away from done; run cd X:\YesAndScheduler; .\scripts\release.ps1 (or commit, since main is level with origin and there is no index.lock).
